summary: Completed testing of Iteration 12 features: Vistas Guardadas (Saved Views) in Vista Comité and Auditoría moved as submodule of Configuración. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with Vistas dropdown, save/load/delete views working, and Auditoría tab correctly placed in Configuración (not in sidebar).

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - cosmetic, not blocking
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: GET /api/vistas-guardadas - Requires authentication (401)
POST /api/vistas-guardadas - Requires authentication (401)
DELETE /api/vistas-guardadas/{id} - Requires authentication (401)
GET /api/vistas-guardadas - Returns list of saved views (200)
POST /api/vistas-guardadas - Creates view in individual mode (200)
POST /api/vistas-guardadas - Creates view in group mode (200)
POST /api/vistas-guardadas - Rejects duplicate names (400)
PUT /api/vistas-guardadas/{id} - Updates view successfully (200)
PUT /api/vistas-guardadas/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent view
DELETE /api/vistas-guardadas/{id} - Deletes view successfully (200)
DELETE /api/vistas-guardadas/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent view
Saved view contains all required fields (id, nombre, descripcion, agrupar_por_grupo, grupos_ids, informes_adicionales, informes_individuales, severidades)
GET /api/historial - Requires authentication (401)
GET /api/historial - Returns audit history with pagination (200)
GET /api/historial - Supports filtering by entidad
GET /api/historial - Supports pagination (limit, skip)
UI: 'Vistas' button visible in Vista Comité header with count badge
UI: Dropdown shows 'Guardar vista actual' option
UI: Save view modal opens with name input, description, and configuration summary
UI: Saved views appear in dropdown after creation
UI: Loading a saved view applies filters correctly (agrupar_por_grupo, severidades, etc.)
UI: Delete view shows confirmation dialog
UI: Delete view removes view from dropdown
UI: Success toasts appear for save/load/delete operations
UI: Auditoría NOT in sidebar (correct - moved to Configuración)
UI: Auditoría tab visible in Configuración page
UI: Auditoría tab shows 'Auditoría del Sistema' header
UI: Auditoría has filters (Entidad, Acción, Usuario, dates)
UI: Auditoría shows audit history table with records
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - minor improvement
Chart dimension warnings in Dashboard - cosmetic issue, not blocking functionality
seed_data_creation: Test vistas created and cleaned up during testing. Existing 'Comité Q4 2024' view was used for load testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 features fully tested: 1) Vistas Guardadas CRUD endpoints at /api/vistas-guardadas all working with proper authentication. 2) VistaGuardada model includes: nombre, descripcion, agrupar_por_grupo, grupos_ids, informes_adicionales, informes_individuales, severidades. 3) 'Vistas' button in Vista Comité header shows dropdown with saved views and 'Guardar vista actual' option. 4) Save view modal captures current filter configuration. 5) Loading a view applies all saved filters. 6) Delete view shows confirmation dialog. 7) Auditoría moved from sidebar to Configuración as a tab (tab-auditoria). 8) Auditoría tab only visible for admin users. 9) /api/historial endpoint returns audit history with filtering and pagination.
